name: Soundhope International Muslim Academy (Soundhope Schools)
description: Muslim school group in Baruwa, Ipaja established 1995 by a retired Lagos State teacher; runs Soundhope Montessori Nursery/Primary and Soundhope Private Academy (secondary, started 2000). Cambridge associate school centre and partner of Bronston Canadian Academy; offers Nigerian, British and Canadian curricula (IGCSE, Checkpoint, Cambridge A & O Levels).
address: 7/9 Soundhope Avenue, Baruwa Inside, by Pako Bus Stop, Baruwa, Ipaja, Lagos
evidence: User-attested locally as 'Soundhope Montessori'. Edusko lists it as 'Soundhope International Muslim Academy', a secondary school in Ipaja, Lagos State — the name itself states Muslim identity. SchoolsCompass has a separate listing for 'Soundhope Montessori Primary School' at 189, Abule Egun Bus Stop, Baruwa, Ipaja (fees N50,000-N150,000/term, website given as www.soundhopeschools.net); that listing does not state Islamic identity. Own site soundhope.com.ng appeared in search results but did not resolve when fetched. Phone numbers shown on directory listings appear to be the directories' own contact lines, so phone left null.

name: The Jannah-Sprouts School
description: Nursery/primary school in Gowon Estate, Iyana-Ipaja; business registry shows it was started in 2018. Active on Instagram and Facebook with school-life posts (including Eid Mubarak greetings).
address: 2, Alowonle Street, off Sewage Road, Gowon Estate, Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
evidence: User-attested locally as 'Janah Sprout'. Nigerian business registry aggregators (b2bhint BN-2641696, ng-check) list 'THE JANNAH-SPROUTS SCHOOL, LAGOS' at 2 Alowonle Street, Gowon Estate, Iyana Ipaja, started 2018. Instagram account 'The JANNAH Sprouts School' found via search snippets only (per platform-fetch rules), including an 'Eid Mubarak' reel — consistent with Muslim identity but no source explicitly states it is an Islamic school, hence confidence capped.

name: Flowers and Heart Nursery and Primary School
description: Self-described 'very humble Muslim school' in Abule-Egba offering creche, preschool and primary classes, with daily Qur'an memorisation, Arabic language teaching and a one-on-one, purpose-driven approach.
evidence: Own website (WordPress) explicitly identifies it as a Muslim school in Abule-Egba with Islamic values, daily Qur'an memorisation and Arabic; lists email mtdolaj@gmail.com. Street address and phone not published on the site.

name: Ummul-Khair Model Schools
description: Muslim school in Alagbado offering Western and Islamic education from creche through secondary (Ummul-Khair Model College approved by Lagos State in 2013). Runs national, British and American curricula with full Islamic etiquette teaching and memorisation of the Qur'an and Hadith.
address: Block 44, Plot 19/20, Aina Aladi Street, off AIT Station, Ilapo Estate, Alagbado, Lagos
evidence: Listed in Lagos State OEQA approved private secondary schools registry as 'UMMUL-KHAIR MODEL COLLEGE, Block 44, plot 19/20, Aina Aladi street, Ilapo Estate, Alagbado, ALIMOSHO, 2013'. Company registry aggregators show UMMUL-KHAIR MODEL SCHOOLS LTD, RC 1262579, registered 22 May 2015 at the same address. School profile pages (yaclass) describe it as a Muslim school offering Western and Islamic education, Qur'an and Hadith memorisation. Own website ummulkhairmodelschools.com.ng did not resolve when fetched.

name: Alwaarith Model School
description: Muslim primary school in Amikanle, Alagbado with classical Arabic training and Quranic instruction; motto themes include 'Love for all and hate for none' and building God-conscious students. Has a sister secondary school, Alwaarith Model College. Fees below N50,000 per term.
address: 22 Oluwaniyi Street, Anjorin, off Amikanle Road, AIT, Alagbado, Lagos
evidence: SchoolsCompass listing states it is a Muslim school with 'guarantee of full Islamic religion awareness', classical Arabic and Quranic instruction, at 22 Oluwaniyi Street off Amikanle Road, Alagbado. Website alwaarithschools.com is named on the listing but did not resolve when fetched. Phone on the listing appears to be SchoolsCompass's own contact line (same number appears on unrelated listings), so left null.

name: Al Iman Nursery and Primary School
description: Muslim nursery and primary school in Akinola, Iyana-Ipaja; member of the League of Muslim School Proprietors (LEAMSP).
address: 9, Idowu Rafiu Street, Oju Odo Bus Stop, Akinola, Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
evidence: Listed (as 'AL IMAN NUR AND PRIMARY SCHOOL') in the League of Muslim School Proprietors (LEAMSP) member-schools directory, Alimosho zone, with address, phone and email as recorded. LEAMSP membership indicates Muslim school identity; no independent second source found.

name: Earnest Schools
description: Private school in Megida, Ayobo founded around 2005 by proprietor Mr. Ismail Ogunyomi; celebrated its 20th anniversary in August 2025. Member of the League of Muslim School Proprietors (LEAMSP), with close ties to the Megida Central Mosque community.
address: 6, Oniyide Ilobi Street, off Alaja Road, Megida, Ayobo, Lagos
evidence: Community Standard news report covers the school's 20th anniversary in Ayobo (proprietor Mr. Ismail Ogunyomi, clerics from Megida Central Mosque in attendance). Also listed in the LEAMSP (League of Muslim School Proprietors) member directory with the address, phone and email recorded here — the basis for its Muslim-school classification.

name: Nurul-Istijabah Schools
description: Islamic school in Amikanle/Kola Command Road area of Alagbado offering creche, nursery, primary and college sections, with tahfiz (Qur'an memorisation) instructors and Arabic instruction. Facebook posts advertise boarding facilities and annual pre-Ramadan lectures; attached to the Nurul-Istijabah Mosque.
address: 14a, Amikanle Road, Kola Command Road, Alagbado, Lagos
evidence: Own website confirms name, address (14a Amikanle Road, Kola Command Road, Alagbado), phones (234) 802 958 7174 / (234) 708 644 8344, email, and Islamic identity ('Competent & Resources Tahifz Instructors', Arabic). Also in the LEAMSP member directory ('NURULISTIJABAH SCHOOL ALAGBADO'). Facebook page (search snippets only) shows 2024 admissions with boarding facilities and pre-Ramadan lectures. No og:image meta tag on site (logo is a relative-path image), so image_url null.
